title: Present Verb Patterns
description: A closer look at common present-tense verb patterns, with forms, examples, and quick review tools.

content.title: Pattern Overview
content.description: Bulgarian verbs follow patterns, but each pattern still needs the right stem and ending.

content.title: Three habits that help
bullets: Learn the full verb, not only the translation.
Listen for the vowel before the ending.
Practice with a full sentence instead of a single word.
content.note: That extra context makes conjugation feel less abstract.

content.title: Pattern reminder
content.text: Verbs like работя and живея are common learner verbs because they show two different present-tense shapes.

content.title: Verbs Ending in -я
content.description: These verbs often use the familiar -я / -иш / -и pattern.

content.note: A very useful sentence pattern for location and residence.

content.title: Other Common Present Forms
content.description: These verbs help reinforce the rest of the present-tense system.

content.title: High-Frequency Sentence Practice
content.description: Use full phrases to see how verbs behave with time and context.

rows: I am working from home today.

content.title: Self-Check
content.description: One quick question to end the lesson.

content.question: Which form matches 'they work'?
content.note: The subject pronoun is the fastest clue when you are unsure.
